boolean_field_required.title: Boolean field (required checkbox)
boolean_field_required.description: Required booleans stay binary and cannot be unset

boolean_field_with_default.title: Boolean field with default value
boolean_field_with_default.description: A boolean field, rendered as a checkbox, with a default value

boolean_toggleswitch.title: Boolean field (ToggleSwitch)
boolean_toggleswitch.description: Use options.variant = 'toggleswitch' for a switch-style boolean

boolean_togglebutton.title: Boolean field (ToggleButton)
boolean_togglebutton.description: Use options.variant = 'togglebutton' with options.trueLabel and options.falseLabel

boolean_selectbutton.title: Boolean field (SelectButton)
boolean_selectbutton.description: Use options.variant = 'selectbutton' with custom true and false labels

boolean_selectbutton_required.title: Boolean field (SelectButton required)
boolean_selectbutton_required.description: Required SelectButton boolean remains a strict true/false control

boolean_checkbox_not_applicable.title: Boolean field (checkbox + unset)
boolean_checkbox_not_applicable.description: Optional checkbox with allowNotApplicable offers a third 'not applicable' state by unsetting the property

boolean_toggleswitch_not_applicable.title: Boolean field (ToggleSwitch + unset)
boolean_toggleswitch_not_applicable.description: Optional ToggleSwitch with allowNotApplicable can return to the unset state

boolean_togglebutton_not_applicable.title: Boolean field (ToggleButton + unset)
boolean_togglebutton_not_applicable.description: Optional ToggleButton with allowNotApplicable can return to the unset state

boolean_selectbutton_not_applicable.title: Boolean field (SelectButton tristate)
boolean_selectbutton_not_applicable.description: Optional SelectButton with allowNotApplicable renders yes/no/not-applicable options

boolean_radio_not_applicable.title: Boolean field (Radio tristate)
boolean_radio_not_applicable.description: Optional radio variant with allowNotApplicable renders yes/no/not-applicable options
